title: Durable response of anaplastic thyroid cancer to pembrolizumab combined with chemotherapy: A case report.
snippet: Anaplastic thyroid cancer is a notoriously aggressive malignancy with a dismal prognosis, typically associated with a median overall survival of less than one year. Therapeutic alternatives are particularly limited for patients without actionable driver mutations. Here, we report a case of BRAF V600E wild-type, PD-L1-positive (tumor proportion score of 80%)...
